name: BACARDÍ Spiced
short_description: A rum with charisma that adds both light and deep notes to your drink.
tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Spiced has upfront notes of creamy delicious vanilla, woody and subtle honey through the mid-palette, and a natural cinnamon and nutmeg spice finish. Vanilla and cinnamon Sweet and spiced Black pepper and fudge
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Spiced is a spiced rum made with aged rum and blended natural flavours and spices, with a gentle smoky note from charred American oak barrels. It shows creamy vanilla and cinnamon on the nose, a sweet, spiced palate with woody oak and subtle honey, and a finish of natural cinnamon, nutmeg, black pepper and fudge. Bold yet smooth in texture, it suits ice-cold serves with cola or ginger beer and works well in mixed spiced rum drinks and cocktails such as rum punch, spiced mule, and pineapple-based drinks. Flavor tags: vanilla, oak, honey, pepper, cinnamon, pineapple.
display_description: A rum with charisma that adds both light and deep notes to your drink.
